title: stellaria laeta var. altocaulis
intro: Stellaria laeta var. altocaulis, also known as the high-altitude starwort, is a variety of flowering plant belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stellaria laeta var. altocaulis include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Stellaria laeta var. altocaulis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
